query: How many active customers does NileFinance currently have, and what is their average account balance across all account types?
What are the names and interest rates of all five account types offered by NileFinance?
List all 8 branches with their city and the date they were opened.
How many customers in the database are Egyptian nationals?
What is the total number of transactions per status (completed, failed, reversed, pending)?
How many employees are currently active in each role across all branches?
What is the distribution of KYC statuses (approved, pending, rejected, expired) across all customers?
How many loans exist per status (active, closed, defaulted, restructured)?
What is the total number of portfolio holdings per asset class (Equity, Bond, ETF, MutualFund, GoldCertificate)?
List all assets traded on EGX along with their sector and asset class.
List the top 5 branches by total outstanding loan balance, showing branch name and the sum.
Show the monthly total transaction volume for completed transactions in 2024, grouped by month.
What is the distribution of loan statuses across all loan types? Show counts per type-status combination.
Find all customers whose debt-to-income ratio exceeds 0.60. Return their name, credit score, risk tier, and DTI.
What are the top 3 best-performing assets by average price change percentage? Show symbol, name, and avg change.
List all Conservative portfolios with total_value above EGP 1,000,000. Show portfolio name, customer name, and total value.
Show total amount disbursed per loan type and the average interest rate charged for each.
What is the average, minimum, and maximum credit score per risk tier?
List the top 5 customers by total account balance (sum across all their active accounts in EGP).
How many transactions were processed per channel in 2024? Include total amount per channel.
Which customers have both a defaulted loan and an expired KYC record? Return their name, national ID, and branch.
How many loan payments were made late per loan type? Include average days late for each type.
For each branch, show number of active employees per role as a pivot: tellers, loan officers, managers, investment analysts, risk analysts.
For each customer with an active loan and active portfolio, show name, total outstanding debt, portfolio value, and net position.
Which branches have a loan default rate above 20%? Show branch name, total loans, defaulted count, and default rate %.
Calculate unrealized P&L percentage for each asset class across all active portfolios. Show asset class, total current value, cost basis, and P&L %.
List the top 10 customers by total transaction volume (all completed transactions). Include branch, tx count, and total volume.
Identify customers with more than 3 late loan payments who are in the Very High risk tier. Show name, late payment count, avg days late, and relationship manager.
Find customers holding accounts in more than one currency. List their name, currencies held, and total balance per currency.
Produce a credit risk summary per branch: customer count, avg credit score, count per risk tier (Low/Medium/High/Very High), and avg default probability.

What does the NileFinance digital cybersecurity policy say about zero-trust architecture and information security principles?

Which customers have expired KYC and active investment portfolios? What does the investment products guide say happens to their trading activity?
Show the top 5 customers by total portfolio value. What management fee tier applies to each per the investment products fee schedule?
Count transactions per channel in 2024. What are the single transaction and daily limits for each channel per NileFinance digital banking terms?
List all customers with rejected KYC records. What does the AML policy require the bank to do when KYC is rejected?

List all restructured loans and their customers. What does the credit policy say about the conditions under which a loan may be restructured?
